ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award show */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award show (e.g., International Emmys) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the award show is held */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the award show was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., program, acting, writing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award show */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the nominee in the production */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominations" (
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nomination */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the nomination was made */,
  "result" TEXT /* Outcome of the nomination (e.g., won, nominated) */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominations_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "production_name" TEXT /* Name of the production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production */,
  "production_type" TEXT /* Type of production (e.g., TV series, movie) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the production was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_nominees" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id", "nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "nomination_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nomination being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nomination_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomination_id") REFERENCES nominations ("nomination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_shows" (
  "award_show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award show */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award */,
  "award_show_name" TEXT /* Name of the award show */,
  "award_show_date" TEXT /* Date of the award show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_shows_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominee_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the nominee */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominee_submissions_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each award show

Country where the award show is held
Year the award show was established
Type of category (e.g., program, acting, writing)

Role of the user (e.g., admin, user)
